---
title: "Daily Mobility Validation"
subtitle: "Biases in Spanish Open Mobility Data"
author:
  - "Simone Aumann"
  - "Helena Gartmeier"
  - "Egor Kotov"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    footer: "Biases in Spanish Open Mobility Data"
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    preview-links: auto
    self-contained: true
    transition: none
    background-transition: none
    pdf-separate-fragments: true
---

## Data and Methods {vertical-align="center"}

```{=html}
<div style="text-align: center;">
<br>
<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 10px; width: 100%; align-items: start;">
  <div style="padding: 5px; margin: 0 5px;">
    <img src="media/spanishoddata-logo.png" style="height: 110px; width: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto 10px;">
    <div style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 2px; font-size: 0.85em;">Mobility Data</div>
    <div style="font-size: 0.65em; font-family: monospace; color: #566573;">{spanishoddata}</div>
  </div>

  <div style="padding: 5px; margin: 0 5px;">
    <img src="media/ineapir-logo.png" style="height: 110px; width: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto 10px;">
    <div style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 2px; font-size: 0.85em;">Census Commuting</div>
    <div style="font-size: 0.65em; font-family: monospace; color: #566573;">{ineapir}</div>
  </div>

  <div style="padding: 5px; margin: 0 5px;">
    <img src="media/ineAtlas-logo.png" style="height: 110px; width: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto 10px;">
    <div style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 2px; font-size: 0.85em;">Population Benchmark</div>
    <div style="font-size: 0.65em; font-family: monospace; color: #566573;">{ineAtlas}</div>
  </div>

  <div style="padding: 5px; margin: 0 5px;">
    <img src="media/debiasR-logo.png" style="height: 110px; width: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto 10px;">
    <div style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 2px; font-size: 0.85em;">Coverage Measurement</div>
    <div style="font-size: 0.65em; font-family: monospace; color: #566573;">{debiasR}</div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```

## [Entire Country]{.glass-box} {background-color="black" background-image="media/spain-folding-flows.gif" background-size="contain"}

## [5 years of hourly OD matrices]{.glass-box} {background-color="black" background-image="media/barcelona-time.gif" background-size="contain"}

## Results

<!-- ## Hourly Coverage Score (March 2023)

![](../figures/hourly_coverage_score_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"} -->

## Population Coverage (March 2023)

![](../figures/population_coverage_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"}


## Population Coverage Score (March 2023)

![](../figures/pop_vs_coverage_score_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"}


## Daily Coverage Score

### (No Filters)

![](../figures/daily_coverage_score_all_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"}


## Daily Coverage Score

### (home -> work/study)

![](../figures/daily_coverage_score_work_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"}


## Daily Coverage Score

### (home -> work/study + infreq)

![](../figures/daily_coverage_score_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"}

## Coverage Score Across Activity Filters

### Work/study only

![](../figures/activity_combo_coverage_work_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"}

## Coverage Score Across Activity Filters

### Work/study + frequent

![](../figures/activity_combo_coverage_work_frequent_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"}

## Coverage Score Across Activity Filters

### Best match: work/study + infrequent

![](../figures/activity_combo_coverage_best_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"}

## Generation Residuals (March 2023)

![](../figures/daily_generation_residuals_march_2023.png){fig-align="center"}
